data.title: Tempus AI stock surges as company reports $1.27 billion revenue in 2025, 111% growth in Diagnostics, $367 million in Q4 revenue.
data.description: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) saw its stock increase following the release of its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company reported total revenue of approximately $1.27 billion for 2025, marking an 83% growth year-over-year. Excluding Ambry, the organic growth was around 30%. In terms of revenue breakdown, Diagnostics brought in about $955 million, showing a substantial 111% increase compared to the previous year. This growth was primarily driven by a 26% rise in oncology test volume and a 29% increase in hereditary testing. Data and applications revenue reached around $316 million, a 31% growth fueled by a 38% surge in Insights (data licensing). For the fourth quarter, Tempus AI reported revenue of about $367 million, an 83% increase year-over-year. Diagnostics revenue amounted to approximately $266 million, up 121% from the previous year, with oncology test volume growing by 29% and hereditary testing expanding by 23%. Data and applications revenue stood at $100 million.

data.title: Cynthia Dano, a two-time cancer survivor, shares her healing journey after being uprooted by cancer.
data.description: Olympia, Washington - On January 12, 2026, Cynthia Dano opened up about her battle with cancer, a diagnosis she received in 2014. Citing her family history of breast cancer, Dano spoke candidly about the challenges she faced. Despite the initial shock, Dano's story is one of resilience and hope as she discussed the importance of reclaiming time and the power it holds in difficult circumstances. Her reflections shed light on the emotional journey individuals undergo when dealing with illness.

data.title: Champagne Specialist Course returns to Verona in Feb 2026, 2 editions in English and Italian. Hosted by Italian Wine Academy.
data.description: In Verona, Italy, the Italian Wine Academy is set to hold the Comité Champagne 'Champagne Specialist' Course in February 2026 for the second time. The course will consist of two editions in the same week, one in English and the other in Italian, with separate instructors for each. This prestigious program attracts wine enthusiasts seeking in-depth knowledge on champagne. Attendees will have the opportunity to enhance their expertise in this sector and gain valuable insights.

data.title: Exchange's founder justifies freezing $40k in coins as user confesses to purchasing KYC accounts, citing compliance obligations.
data.description: Star Xu recently justified his decision to freeze $40,000 in stablecoins, stating that a user confessed to purchasing verified accounts. The exchange mentioned strict KYC and AML requirements as the reason for the action.

data.title: Nutex Health re-opens Bayou City ER & Hospital in Houston, with 27 micro hospitals in 12 states. NASDAQ: NUTX.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Nutex Health Inc., also known as Nutex Health, a healthcare company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol NUTX, operates 27 modern micro hospitals and hospital outpatient departments across 12 states. The company follows a physician-led integrated healthcare delivery system with a primary focus on primary care services.

data.title: LambdaTest rebrands to TestMu AI, introduces Vibe Testing for infinite code, powers 1.5+ billion tests/year for 18,000+ enterprises.
data.description: Vibe Testing is being introduced in response to the Age of Infinite Code. TestMu AI is leveraging Agentic AI to revolutionize software development by introducing autonomous agents to maintain quality in line with the exponential growth of code. Over 1.5 billion tests are conducted annually by TestMu AI, benefiting more than 18,000 enterprises. This innovative approach is being rolled out in locations such as SAN FRANCISCO and NOIDA, India.

data.title: XCMG has made multiple deliveries to international markets in 2026, including Europe and North America.
data.description: In Xuzhou, China, XCMG Machinery (SHE: 000425) has opened 2026 with numerous batch deliveries of a variety of products to customers globally. These deliveries include shipments to Europe, North America, South America, and other regions. The company's proactive start to the year underscores its commitment to serving a broad customer base.

data.title: Stock futures decline after positive close on Friday. DOJ clashes with Federal Reserve. Nonfarm payrolls up by 50,000 in December. Treasury bonds: 10-year at 4.19%, two-year at 3.53%. Markets pricing 95% likelihood of unchanged interest rates in January. Index performance down: Dow Jones -0.78%, S&P 500 -0.76%, Nasdaq 100 -1.04%, Russell 2000 -0.57%. Vistra Corp. rose 0.69% premarket after nuclear power deal with Meta Platforms. Alibaba Group Holding up 4.44% due to Cloud's Qwen series success in AI.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell after a positive close on Friday, with major benchmark indices trading lower. Federal Reserve tensions escalated as Chair Jerome Powell revealed threats of "criminal indictment" from the Department of Justice over his testimony on building renovation costs. Nonfarm payrolls for December showed a slight increase of 50,000, below expectations. The U.S. Supreme Court did not rule on President Trump's global tariffs, with a 75% chance they'll be upheld. Treasury bonds had yields of 4.19% and 3.53%. Markets projected a 95% chance of interest rates remaining unchanged in January. Index performance saw declines ranging from -0.57% to -1.04%. S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 ETFs were lower. Vistra Corp. rose 0.69% after signing a nuclear power deal with Meta Platforms. Alibaba Group rose 4.44% with its AI system surpassing 700 million downloads. BABA maintains a stronger long-term price trend. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nanochon raised $4.1M in funding to develop a knee implant, with total capital raised now at...
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Nanochon, an orthopedic device company located in Washington, D.C., successfully completed a funding round that exceeded its target amount. This additional funding has increased the total capital raised by the company to a considerable sum. Nanochon specializes in developing knee implants to address articular cartilage defects.

data.title: Travelzoo announces new Club Offers for UK Club Members: £590PP for a 5-night stay by a white-sand beach in the Seychelles.
data.description: In London on January 12, 2026, Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) introduced several exclusive Club Offers for UK Club Members. Among the new offers is a luxury trip to the Seychelles priced at £590 per person. This deal includes a five-night stay by a pristine white-sand beach. The offers are carefully selected and negotiated to cater to travel enthusiasts, showcasing just a few of the many exciting opportunities available through Travelzoo®.
